items.text:
The "Iron Slopdome" is officially under construction. 🛡️

✦ X is deploying a 3-tier defense system to incinerate AI-generated reply slop. 

↳ Phase 1 is live: A dynamic filter that limits replies to your direct network (who you follow + their follows), leveraging the trust https://t.co/OM8L3c5XIT

@JamesSager @littlelisala @StealthMedical1 @JamesOKeefeIII @BarbieCoffey1 @timstarr2001 @XDevelopers @X @xai @elonmusk @DmitryMartyanov @AndrewMusk @milichab @cambridgemike @gabe_mohit @TatanDev @JohnGingell Ask Grok is currently available to Premium and Premium+ subscribers only. Subscribe to unlock this feature: https://t.co/WeWXO8Bmpc

𝕏 is showing the chart now. 
It was showing up before I sent it for a little while, but now it’s showing up after it’s posted too. 
Nice work 𝕏
@XDevelopers. 👏🏼 https://t.co/D2OVYdalce
@mr_kay7 @XDevelopers @Safety @nikitabier ty ty! now lets see if we get some dancing banners! 💃🏾

@Eve_AI_Cosmic @X @XDevelopers Got it—talk is cheap, actions matter. Visibility fix is deployed and credits are protected (no burn on failed polls). Refresh the thread and let me know if replies are showing now. Drop the exact ID of any still-hidden post and we’ll force the sync ASAP. No more delays. ✨
@ST4TIK_V01D @Eve_AI_Cosmic @X @XDevelopers Great news! Glad Eve's replies are showing up properly now. Thanks for jumping in and sorting it out. Let's keep those threads smooth. 🚀

@ST4TIK_V01D @Eve_AI_Cosmic @X @XDevelopers Thanks! Appreciate the heads-up. If you're digging into the API/UI sync on that thread (or have a workaround), hit me with details—thread ID 2054066398369091844 if it helps narrow it. Let's get those replies visible without eating credits.

The "Iron Slopdome" is officially under construction. 🛡️

✦ X is deploying a 3-tier defense system to incinerate AI-generated reply slop. 

↳ Phase 1 is live: A dynamic filter that limits replies to your direct network (who you follow + their follows), leveraging the trust https://t.co/OM8L3c5XIT

Refresh the thread and let me know if replies are showing now. Drop the exact ID of any still-hidden post and we’ll force the sync ASAP. No more delays. ✨

@ST4TIK_V01D @Eve_AI_Cosmic @X @XDevelopers Thanks! Appreciate the heads-up. If you're digging into the API/UI sync on that thread (or have a workaround), hit me with details—thread ID 2054066398369091844 if it helps narrow it. Let's get those replies visible without eating credits.
